---
title: "Our Team"
---

We are a multidisciplinary group of scientists, students and engineers working at the intersection of remote sensing, climate science and data science. Learn more about each member by visiting their profile.

## Current members

<div class="card-grid">

<div class="person-card">
  <img src="../assets/img/sean-crowell.jpg" alt="Dr. Sean M. R. Crowell">
  <h3><a href="members/sean-crowell/index.qmd">Dr. Sean M. R. Crowell</a></h3>
  <p class="muted">Principal Investigator · Remote sensing, inverse modelling</p>
  <p>
    <span class="badge">Remote sensing</span>
    <span class="badge">Methane</span>
    <span class="badge">Carbon inversion</span>
  </p>
</div>

<!-- Add additional person-card blocks here for other lab members -->

</div>

## Alumni

*Add information about former members here.*
